# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-authz
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-authz
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: production
        - name: mobile-app
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-authz
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
---

  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: TCP

  namespace: production

  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: TCP

  namespace: production

    name: cache-service-server

    meshTLS:

          namespace: production

          namespace: production

          namespace: production
